Name: UAudioComponent
Description:
AudioComponent is used to play a Sound
 
  @see USoundBase

Variables.Name: Sound
Variables.Description: The sound to be played

Variables.Name: InstanceParameters
Variables.Description: Array of per-instance parameters for this AudioComponent.

Variables.Name: SoundClassOverride
Variables.Description: Optional sound group this AudioComponent belongs to

Variables.Name: bAutoDestroy
Variables.Description: Auto destroy this component on completion

Variables.Name: bStopWhenOwnerDestroyed
Variables.Description: Stop sound when owner is destroyed

Variables.Name: bShouldRemainActiveIfDropped
Variables.Description: Whether the wave instances should remain active if they're dropped by the prioritization code. Useful for e.g. vehicle sounds that shouldn't cut out.

Variables.Name: bAllowSpatialization
Variables.Description: Overrides spatialization enablement in either the attenuation asset or on this audio component's attenuation settings override.

Variables.Name: bOverrideAttenuation
Variables.Description: Allows defining attenuation settings directly on this audio component without using an attenuation settings asset.

Variables.Name: bOverrideSubtitlePriority
Variables.Description: Whether or not to override the sound's subtitle priority.

Variables.Name: bIsUISound
Variables.Description: Whether or not this sound plays when the game is paused in the UI

Variables.Name: bEnableLowPassFilter
Variables.Description: Whether or not to apply a low-pass filter to the sound that plays in this audio component.

Variables.Name: bSuppressSubtitles
Variables.Description: If true, subtitles in the sound data will be ignored.

Variables.Name: AudioComponentUserID
Variables.Description: Configurable, serialized ID for audio plugins

Variables.Name: PitchModulationMin
Variables.Description: The lower bound to use when randomly determining a pitch multiplier

Variables.Name: PitchModulationMax
Variables.Description: The upper bound to use when randomly determining a pitch multiplier

Variables.Name: VolumeModulationMin
Variables.Description: The lower bound to use when randomly determining a volume multiplier

Variables.Name: VolumeModulationMax
Variables.Description: The upper bound to use when randomly determining a volume multiplier

Variables.Name: VolumeMultiplier
Variables.Description: A volume multiplier to apply to sounds generated by this component

Variables.Name: Priority
Variables.Description: A priority value that is used for sounds that play on this component that scales against final output volume.

Variables.Name: SubtitlePriority
Variables.Description: Used by the subtitle manager to prioritize subtitles wave instances spawned by this component.

Variables.Name: PitchMultiplier
Variables.Description: A pitch multiplier to apply to sounds generated by this component

Variables.Name: LowPassFilterFrequency
Variables.Description: The frequency of the lowpass filter (in hertz) to apply to this voice. A frequency of 0.0 is the device sample rate and will bypass the filter.

Variables.Name: AttenuationSettings
Variables.Description: If bOverrideSettings is false, the asset to use to determine attenuation properties for sounds generated by this component

Variables.Name: AttenuationOverrides
Variables.Description: If bOverrideSettings is true, the attenuation properties to use for sounds generated by this component

Variables.Name: ConcurrencySettings
Variables.Description: What sound concurrency to use for sounds generated by this audio component

Functions.Name: FadeIn
Functions.Description:
This can be used in place of "play" when it is desired to fade in the sound over time.
	 
	  If FadeTime is 0.0, the change in volume is instant.
	  If FadeTime is > 0.0, the multiplier will be increased from 0 to FadeVolumeLevel over FadeIn seconds.

Params.Name: FadeInDuration
Params.Description: how long it should take to reach the FadeVolumeLevel

Params.Name: FadeVolumeLevel
Params.Description: the percentage of the AudioComponents's calculated volume to fade to

Functions.Name: FadeOut
Functions.Description:
This is used in place of "stop" when it is desired to fade the volume of the sound before stopping.
	 
	  If FadeTime is 0.0, this is the same as calling Stop().
	  If FadeTime is > 0.0, this will adjust the volume multiplier to FadeVolumeLevel over FadeInTime seconds
	  and then stop the sound.

Params.Name: FadeOutDuration
Params.Description: how long it should take to reach the FadeVolumeLevel

Params.Name: FadeVolumeLevel
Params.Description: the percentage of the AudioComponents's calculated volume in which to fade to

Functions.Name: Play
Functions.Description: Start a sound playing on an audio component

Functions.Name: Stop
Functions.Description: Stop an audio component playing its sound cue, issue any delegates if needed

Functions.Name: SetPaused
Functions.Description: Pause an audio component playing its sound cue, issue any delegates if needed

Return.Description: true if this component is currently playing a SoundCue.

Functions.Name: AdjustVolume
Functions.Description: This will allow one to adjust the volume of an AudioComponent on the fly

Functions.Name: SetFloatParameter
Functions.Description: Set a float instance parameter for use in sound cues played by this audio component

Functions.Name: SetWaveParameter
Functions.Description: Set a sound wave instance parameter for use in sound cues played by this audio component

Functions.Name: SetBoolParameter
Functions.Description: Set a boolean instance parameter for use in sound cues played by this audio component

Functions.Name: SetIntParameter
Functions.Description: Set an integer instance parameter for use in sound cues played by this audio component

Functions.Name: SetUISound
Functions.Description: Set whether sounds generated by this audio component should be considered UI sounds

Functions.Name: AdjustAttenuation
Functions.Description: Modify the attenuation settings of the audio component

Functions.Name: SetSubmixSend
Functions.Description: Sets how much audio the sound should send to the given submix.

Functions.Name: SetLowPassFilterEnabled
Functions.Description: Sets whether or not the low pass filter is enabled on the audio component.

Functions.Name: SetLowPassFilterFrequency
Functions.Description: Sets lowpass filter frequency of the audio component.

Delegate.Name: OnAudioFinished
Delegate.Description: called when we finish playing audio, either because it played to completion or because a Stop() call turned it off early

Delegate.Name: OnAudioPlaybackPercent
Delegate.Description:
Called as a sound plays on the audio component to allow BP to perform actions based on playback percentage.
	 Computed as samples played divided by total samples, taking into account pitch.
	 Not currently implemented on all platforms.

Delegate.Name: OnQueueSubtitles
Delegate.Description: Called when subtitles are sent to the SubtitleManager.  Set this delegate if you want to hijack the subtitles for other purposes
